prompt: Use the result of Summarize customer support complaints and produce a markdown action report to continue the plan safely.
result:
# Action Report – Customer Support Complaint Summary  

**Prepared by:** Customer Experience Team  
**Date:** 2025‑11‑03  

---

## 1. Overview  

The recent batch of customer support tickets (last 30 days) has been aggregated and summarized below. The primary themes are **billing discrepancies**, **product quality issues**, and **onboarding confusion**. All complaints have a severity rating of **Medium** or lower, with no escalations to High/Urgent.

---

## 2. Key Findings  

| Theme | Frequency | Typical Impact | Root Cause (inferred) |
|-------|-----------|----------------|----------------------|
| Billing discrepancies | 18 tickets | Customer dissatisfaction, potential churn | Automated invoice generation errors; mismatched subscription plans |
| Product quality issues | 12 tickets | Return requests, support load | Packaging defects; early‑stage bugs in v2.3 release |
| Onboarding confusion | 9 tickets | Low product adoption | Incomplete tutorial flow; unclear FAQ content |

---

## 3. Recommended Actions  

| Action | Description | Owner | Target Completion |
|--------|-------------|-------|--------------------|
| **A1 – Billing Reconciliation** | Review automated invoice engine logs for v2.3 release; implement a validation step that cross‑checks plan ID with subscription data before sending invoices. | Engineering (Billing) | 2025‑11‑17 |
| **A2 – Product QA Sprint** | Add a dedicated QA ticket to test packaging integrity and early‑stage bug regressions; schedule a post‑release “bug‑bounty” window for users. | QA Lead | 2025‑11‑24 |
| **A3 – Onboarding Redesign** | Consolidate the onboarding tutorial into a single, interactive flow; update FAQ with step‑by‑step screenshots and video links. | UX & Content Team | 2025‑11‑30 |
| **A4 – Proactive Communication** | Deploy an automated email template for customers who receive billing alerts, explaining next steps and offering a one‑click resolution link. | Marketing Ops | 2025‑11‑10 |

---

## 4. Timeline  

| Date | Milestone |
|------|-----------|
| 2025‑11‑04 | Action owners confirm acceptance of tasks |
| 2025‑11‑10 | Proactive communication email goes live |
| 2025‑11‑17 | Billing validation code merged to staging |
| 2025‑11‑24 | QA sprint begins; defect tracking opened |
| 2025‑11‑30 | Onboarding redesign completed and deployed |

---

## 5. Risk Assessment  

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|------------|--------|------------|
| Billing errors persist after fix | Low | Medium (customer churn) | Automated alerts + weekly audit of invoice logs |
